market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Paul Tudor Jones calls bitcoin the 'best inflation hedge,' warns of overvalued stocks
articles.description: It will be "really hard to make money" in stocks over the next decade, said the billionaire investor, noting that the S&P 500's valuation reminds him of the 2000 dot-com bubble.

articles.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
articles.description: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

articles.title: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
articles.description: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.

articles.title: CFTC sues Wisconsin in agency's legal campaign defending prediction markets authority
articles.description: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission added Wisconsin to the list of states it's sued over event-contract jurisdiction, most recently New York.

articles.title: Match Group invests $100M in Sniffies, a cruising app for gay men
articles.description: The app is Match Group's newest attempt to get mobile users excited about online romance again.

articles.title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
articles.description: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

articles.title: Canaan, Tether deepen partnership on immersion-cooled mining systems
articles.description: Canaan secures a new Tether order for modular mining hardware as the stablecoin issuer expands into integrated, data center-style Bitcoin infrastructure.

articles.title: World Cup fever: Chiliz expands to Solana and Base to supercharge fan token trading
articles.description: Chiliz rolled out its own layer-1 network in 2023 to host the trading of its tokens, but is transitioning to what it calls "omnichain distribution."

articles.title: The age of Agentic Commerce has arrived. Consensus 2026 is where you can experience it IRL
articles.description: AI agents are already transacting. The question now is what kind of financial infrastructure they run on -and who builds it.

articles.title: Polymarket reportedly seeking CFTC approval to reopen main exchange to U.S. traders
articles.description: If approved, the move would help Polymarket compete with Kalshi in the U.S., and bring more event-trading activity under CFTC regulatory oversight.

articles.title: Riot extends $200 million Coinbase credit facility, and bitcoin weakness could mean more sales
articles.description: The miner locked in fixed borrowing costs and extended maturity, but a shrinking BTC treasury and loan-to-value triggers leave little room for error if prices slide.

articles.title: US Supreme Court appears split over controversial use of ‘geofence’ search warrants
articles.description: The U.S. top court is expected to rule on whether to allow police to identify criminal suspects by dragnet searching the databases of tech giants.

articles.title: Microsoft says legacy banks are hitting a breaking point as AI takes over the heavy lifting
articles.description: Microsoft and Chainalysis executives warned that as AI agents begin managing transactions at scale, the financial industry must overhaul its legacy infrastructure to prioritize machine identity and trust.

articles.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
articles.description: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

articles.title: BitMart x EAT Trade-to-Feed competition to pay out $4.4m USDT to traders in May 2026
articles.description: The 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition marks BitMart's 8th anniversary and the exchange's strategic listing of EAT, the first cause coin.

articles.title: A crypto coalition releases technical proposal to save Aave users from a massive token exploit
articles.description: DeFi United, a coalition of multiple blockchain projects and crypto ecosystem individuals, has laid out a detailed plan to restore the backing of rsETH after this month’s Kelp DAO hack sent shockwaves through lending markets.

articles.title: Bitcoin price drops below $76K as onchain data sends mixed signals
articles.description: Bitcoin failed to break $80,000 resistance amid weak onchain fundamentals, but rising spot CVD could support a recovery.

articles.title: Founder of Shark Tank-backed startup Scholly sues his acquirer Sallie Mae
articles.description: Chris Gray is suing his startup’s acquirer, Sallie Mae, for wrongful termination and alleging it's selling student data through a subsidiary. Sallie Mae denies the allegations and vows to fight.

articles.title: Every blockchain transaction is a gift to your competition
articles.description: As AI Agents reshape commerce, and make every business an open book, companies will need to figure out what data actually needs to be kept secret – and protect it ferociously – in order to thrive.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
